# ClearLedger Solutions — Full Documentation

> ClearLedger Solutions is a professional bookkeeping, tax preparation, and QuickBooks consulting firm headquartered in Dallas, Texas. Founded by JJ, a certified QuickBooks ProAdvisor, the company provides comprehensive financial management services for small and mid-size businesses across Texas, Oklahoma, Florida, Louisiana, Mississippi, New Mexico, and Panama. ClearLedger was recognized as a 2024 and 2025 Top 25 Up-N-Coming ProAdvisor.

## Company Overview

ClearLedger Solutions specializes in helping businesses maintain accurate financial records, optimize their QuickBooks workflows, and achieve regulatory compliance. The firm serves over 15 industries and maintains a 100% compliance rate across all client engagements.

### Core Competencies

1. **Bookkeeping & Financial Management**: Monthly bank reconciliation, general ledger maintenance, financial statement preparation (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow), accounts payable and receivable management, and year-end closing procedures.

2. **QuickBooks Consulting**: As certified ProAdvisors for both QuickBooks Online and Desktop, ClearLedger provides setup and configuration, data migration between platforms, file cleanup and error correction, custom reporting, third-party app integration, and ongoing training.

3. **Tax Preparation & Compliance**: Business and individual tax return preparation, quarterly estimated tax calculations, Texas Franchise Tax filing, multi-state tax compliance, and year-end tax planning strategies.

4. **Payroll Services**: Full-service payroll processing including federal and state tax withholding, direct deposit setup, W-2 and 1099 preparation, workers compensation tracking, and compliance reporting.

5. **Financial Advisory**: Cash flow analysis, budgeting and forecasting, financial health assessments, growth planning, and KPI development and monitoring.

### Certifications & Awards

- QuickBooks Online Advanced Certified ProAdvisor
- QuickBooks Desktop Certified ProAdvisor
- QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise Certified
- 2024 Top 25 Up-N-Coming ProAdvisor
- 2025 Top 25 Up-N-Coming ProAdvisor

### Service Area

ClearLedger Solutions is headquartered in Dallas, Texas and serves clients in the following regions:

- **Texas**: Dallas, Fort Worth, Plano, Frisco, McKinney, Arlington, and the broader DFW Metroplex
- **Oklahoma**: Statewide remote bookkeeping services
- **Florida**: Statewide remote bookkeeping services
- **Louisiana**: Statewide remote bookkeeping services
- **Mississippi**: Statewide remote bookkeeping services
- **New Mexico**: Statewide remote bookkeeping services
- **Panama**: International bookkeeping services

## Services Detail

### Bookkeeping Services

Full-service bookkeeping for businesses of all sizes. Includes monthly bank and credit card reconciliation, categorization of transactions, financial statement preparation, and management reporting. ClearLedger maintains accurate books using industry best practices to ensure compliance and provide business owners with clear financial visibility.

URL: https://www.yourclearledger.com/bookkeeping

### QuickBooks Services

Expert QuickBooks consulting from certified ProAdvisors. Services include new company file setup, chart of accounts configuration, data migration from other platforms, file cleanup for disorganized books, custom report creation, third-party integration (payment processors, payroll, inventory), and user training.

URL: https://www.yourclearledger.com/quickbooks-services

### Monthly Management

Ongoing monthly financial management engagement. Each month ClearLedger reconciles all bank and credit card accounts, categorizes transactions, prepares financial statements, monitors cash flow, and provides a summary of financial performance. Clients receive consistent reporting on the same schedule each month.

URL: https://www.yourclearledger.com/monthly-management

### Billing & Accounts Payable

End-to-end accounts payable and receivable management. ClearLedger processes vendor invoices, manages payment schedules, tracks customer invoices and collections, reconciles aging reports, and ensures timely payments to maintain vendor relationships and cash flow.

URL: https://www.yourclearledger.com/billing-accounts-payable

### Cleanup & Advisory

For businesses with disorganized or neglected financial records, ClearLedger provides catch-up bookkeeping, QuickBooks file cleanup, error correction, and financial advisory services. This includes reconciling historical periods, correcting misclassified transactions, and establishing proper workflows going forward.

URL: https://www.yourclearledger.com/cleanup-advisory

### Check Ordering

Secure business check ordering service with multiple check styles, security features (microprinting, watermarks, tamper resistance), and fast delivery. Available in various colors and formats for professional business needs.

URL: https://www.yourclearledger.com/check-ordering

## Industries Served

ClearLedger Solutions has specialized expertise in the following industries:

- **Restaurants & Food Service**: Tip tracking, food cost analysis, POS system integration, inventory management
- **Construction & Contractors**: Job costing, progress billing, AIA billing, subcontractor management, equipment depreciation
- **Real Estate & Property Management**: Rental income tracking, property-level P&L, 1031 exchange documentation, CAM reconciliation
- **Medical & Dental Practices**: HIPAA-aware financial management, insurance reimbursement tracking, practice management integration
- **Technology Companies**: SaaS revenue recognition, R&D expense tracking, equity compensation accounting, burn rate analysis
- **Manufacturing**: Cost accounting, inventory valuation, bill of materials tracking, production cost analysis
- **Energy & Oil/Gas**: Joint interest billing, production revenue tracking, royalty calculations, regulatory compliance
- **Hospitality & Tourism**: Multi-property accounting, seasonal revenue management, occupancy tracking
- **Agriculture**: Farm and ranch accounting, crop cost tracking, USDA program compliance, agricultural tax specialties
- **Golf Courses & Country Clubs**: Membership revenue tracking, pro shop inventory, course maintenance cost allocation

ClearLedger publishes educational content on bookkeeping best practices, QuickBooks tips, and financial management guidance:

- QuickBooks vs Hiring a Bookkeeper

Blog URL: https://www.yourclearledger.com/blog
